output.setting: A shifting, unstable dungeon core powered by wild magic

pickup.effect: Applies a chilling effect to the blade

encounters.hazard: Floor tiles vanishing into the void

pickup.effect: Grants damage reduction against unstable magic

encounters.trigger: The shade's death unlocks the path to the Core Chamber bridge

pickup.name: Resonant Crystal
pickup.effect: Humming with energy that disrupts magical bonds

encounters.trigger: Destroying the construct activates the portal to the Warden's Chamber

boss.name: Warden of Chaos
boss.victory_condition: Force the Warden to destabilize by shattering the Resonant Crystal near them, then land a heavy blow

output.objective: Stabilize the dungeon core by slaying the Warden of Chaos
output.reward: A fragment of the core, granting permanent berserker strength
